Function for Bluetooth pairing confirmation using a user confirmation context.

# Purpose
This C source code file defines a function [`bt_driver_pairing_confirm`](<#bt_driver_pairing_confirm>) that is part of a Bluetooth driver interface. The function takes two parameters: a pointer to a `PairingUserConfirmationCtx` structure and a boolean `is_confirmed`. The purpose of this function is to handle the confirmation of a Bluetooth pairing process, where `is_confirmed` indicates whether the user has confirmed the pairing. The function is currently empty, suggesting that the implementation details for handling the pairing confirmation are not yet provided.
